info.title: Blood Bridge API
info.description: An intelligent platform for blood donation coordination using AI and GPS.

post.summary: Registers a new user (Donor or Hospital) into the system.

requestBody.description: The user registration data including personal info and credentials.

400.description: Validation error or registration failure (e.g., email already exists).

post.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token.

requestBody.description: The user's login credentials (email and password).

post.summary: Logs out the currently authenticated user.

401.description: Unauthorized if no valid token is provided.

post.summary: Sends a password reset request to the user's email.

requestBody.description: The forgot password request containing the user's email.

404.description: User with this email not found.

post.summary: Resets the user's password using a valid reset token.

requestBody.description: The reset password data (email, token, and new password).

400.description: Invalid token, expired token, or validation error.

get.summary: Retrieves all blood donation records in the system.

200.description: Returns the list of all donation records.

401.description: Unauthorized if no valid token is provided.

get.summary: Retrieves a specific donation record by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the donation process.

404.description: If the donation record with the given ID is not found.

post.summary: Registers a new donation record in the system.
post.description: Note: The donor identity is automatically resolved from the authenticated user's context.

requestBody.description: The data required to create a new donation record.

400.description: If the input data is invalid or the business logic fails.

put.summary: Updates an existing donation record's information.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the donation record to update.

requestBody.description: The updated data for the donation process.

404.description: If the donation record does not exist.

delete.summary: Permanently deletes a donation record from the system.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the donation record to delete.

404.description: If the donation record with the given ID is not found.

get.summary: Retrieves all donors with optional filtering by blood type and location.

parameters.name: bloodType
parameters.description: Optional: Filter donors by their blood type (e.g., A+, O-, etc.).

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Optional: Filter donors by their city or area.

get.summary: Retrieves details of a specific donor by their ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the donor.

404.description: If the donor record is not found.

post.summary: Registers a new donor in the system.

400.description: If the request data is invalid.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the donor to update.

404.description: If the donor is not found.

delete.summary: Deletes a donor profile from the system.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the donor to be removed.

404.description: If the donor record does not exist.

get.summary: Gets a list of potential compatible donors for a specific blood request using the AI ranking system.

parameters.name: requestId
parameters.description: The ID of the active blood request.

404.description: If the blood request is not found.

post.summary: Submits a donor's response (Accept/Decline) to a specific donation request.

404.description: If the request or donor is not found.

get.summary: Retrieves a paged leaderboard of donors ranked by their contribution count.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: The page number for results (Default is 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of records per page (Default is 10).

put.summary: Confirms that a blood donation process has been successfully completed.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the donation process to be confirmed.

400.description: If the provided ID is invalid.

404.description: If the donation record is not found or cannot be confirmed.

put.summary: Updates the current blood stock levels (inventory) for the authenticated hospital.

requestBody.description: A list of blood types and their corresponding quantities to update.

400.description: If the request data is empty or invalid.

404.description: If the hospital record is not found.

401.description: Unauthorized if the user is not a valid hospital representative.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of notifications for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: The page number for the results (Default is 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of notifications per page (Default is 10).

200.description: Returns the list of notifications successfully.

400.description: If pagination parameters are invalid (less than or equal to zero).

401.description: If the user identity cannot be verified from the token.

patch.summary: Marks all unread notifications as "Read" for the authenticated user.

200.description: All notifications marked as read successfully.

401.description: If the user identity cannot be verified from the token.

post.summary: Submits a new blood request and initiates the AI analysis process.

200.description: Request submitted and AI analysis initiated.

401.description: Unauthorized if the user session is invalid.

get.summary: Tracks the real-time status of a specific blood request.
Fetches the history of all blood requests made by the authenticated user.

post.summary: Confirms the AI-detected blood type and initiates the search.

get.summary: Retrieves the personal profile details of the authenticated user.

401.description: Unauthorized if the user is not logged in.

patch.summary: Updates the user's current GPS coordinates for better matching.

delete.summary: Permanently deletes the user account if no active requests exist.

Bearer.description: Paste your JWT token here. Swagger will send: Authorization: Bearer {token}
